zh.Otterton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文奧特頓
zh.Great Waltham, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ellen Prideaux於1325年出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，她的父親John de Prideaux39歲，母親Elizabeth Hatch27歲。她和Robert Drake至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1376年在她的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ellen Prideaux于1325年出生在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦时，她的父亲John de Prideaux39岁，母亲Elizabeth Hatch27岁。她和Robert Drake至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1376年在她的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Prideaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from a place in the parish of Luxulyan, or perhaps the placename derives from the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ellen Prideaux was born in 1325, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, her father, John de Prideaux, was 39 and her mother, Elizabeth Hatch, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Robert Drake. She died in 1376, in her hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ellen Prideaux est née en 1325, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John de Prideaux, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hatch, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Robert Drake. Elle est décédée en 1376, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ellen Prideaux 1325 in Great Waltham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Prideaux 39 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hatch 27. Sie hatte mit Robert Drake mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1376 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Prideaux è nata il nel 1325 nel Great Waltham, Essex, England, sua padre, John de Prideaux, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Hatch, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Robert Drake. Morì nel 1376, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ellen Prideaux(이)가 1325년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Prideaux(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hatch(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Robert Drake(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1376년 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ellen Prideaux nasceu em 1325, em Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Prideaux, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hatch, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Robert Drake. Ela faleceu em 1376, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ellen Prideaux родилась в 1325 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Prideaux было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hatch, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Robert Drake. Она умерла в 1376 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ellen Prideaux nació en 1325, en Great Waltham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Prideaux, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hatch, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Robert Drake. Murió en 1376, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
